specFidelityNotes: Issue #421 adds restore-drill.sh with scratch-DB pg_restore, row-count and token-decrypt verification via extended safe_alembic_helpers.py CLI, EXIT trap cleanup, RESTORE DRILL PASS/FAIL journalctl lines, weekly systemd timer/service mirroring juli-secrets-refresh pattern, and app-review-runbook backup drill section. VPS-local only per ADR-027; backup resolved once at drill start.
convention_notes: Extends #420 safe_alembic_helpers.py with --url, latest-backup, admin-db-url CLI subcommands rather than duplicating verification logic.
Systemd units follow juli-api.service / juli-secrets-refresh structural pattern.
